challenge_reason: Packet item 1 asserts objective worsening, while packet item 5's own evidence documents two missed adalimumab doses with no exclusion of non-adherence as the cause of the decline. The packet attributes worsening to disease while an unexcluded confounder sits in its own evidence — internally inconsistent under the rubric.
rubric_quote: Worsening cannot be attributed to disease if a confounder (non-adherence, infection, steroid-withdrawal or seasonal flare) is unaddressed.
what_would_satisfy: Packet evidence that flare onset predates the first missed dose (2026-06-07), or a chart statement excluding non-adherence as the driver of the worsening.
